workflow: Workflow B — Direct keyword → page → generate (recommended for Template D cost pages)

steps.description: Create the primary keyword. Save the returned id as keywordId for step 2.

body.notes: GSC priority #1 — pos 7, 2 impressions. Template D. Cluster under Portugal hub (keywordId 10). Also targets: ivf agency lisbon, ivf agency portugal.

steps.description: Create the page shell with slug + SEO metadata before generation. Replace keywordId with the id returned from step 1.

body.title: IVF Cost in Portugal 2026: What Patients Actually Paid
body.metaTitle: IVF Cost in Portugal 2026 — Real Patient Data | MedCover
body.metaDescription: IVF in Portugal costs €3,000–€5,200 per cycle based on verified patient interviews. See what's included, hidden fees, and what patients actually paid.

steps.description: Queue the AI pipeline. Replace {pageId} with the id returned from step 2. No request body required.
Poll every 10–30s until pipelineStatus is READY (or PARTIALLY_COMPLETED if image step failed).
Publish manually if site.autoPublish is false. MedCover site has autoPublish=true, so this may happen automatically when pipeline completes.

optionalSecondaryKeywords.description: Optional — add supporting keywords in the same cluster after the main page is live.
